---
title: "Yiwei Zhang"
image: "files/profile_pic.png"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yiz223@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yiwei-z-5909162a6
---

Welcome to my website!
I'm a student at UCSD passionate about marketing, data, and business analytics.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
